entries.note: Reference. Per-device-eps construction closes completeness on Fez (in-sample margin = 0) and yields 0/85 phase1, 9/85 phase2 detection. Detection structure across attack families documented in Section 5.C; no failure mode listed.

Hoeffding-only at eps_H = 0.1341. Higher detection than B0 (2/85 phase1, 20/85 phase2) but fails in-sample completeness on Fez by 0.0468 — the soundness-side cost of skipping the eps_model + eps_pred budget.
Descriptor consistency, no quantum execution. Pending Appendix C implementation.
Stricker-adapted (L1 mean) at eps_stricker=0.02836. Phase 2 detection rate: 0.1882. Fez in-sample completeness: pass (margin=+0.00122).
